summary: Added RestartPolicy default (Always) to DeploymentSpecDefaults and corresponding tests covering both nil-default and explicit-value-preserved paths. Addresses external review feedback about missing API-server defaults.

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases are covered (nil RestartPolicy defaults to Always)

code_quality_checklist.item: Comment explains why RestartPolicy is here (Deployment-specific) not in PodSpecDefaults
Feature ID CC-0005 tagged in comment
Minimal change — only adds what was missing

security_checklist.item: No user input handling — pure default-filling function

architecture_checklist.item: RestartPolicy default placed in DeploymentSpecDefaults (not PodSpecDefaults) since different workload types have different defaults
Ordering correct: PodSpecDefaults called first, then Deployment-specific RestartPolicy
Solution is as simple as possible

fail_fast_checklist.item: Empty string check is correct for corev1.RestartPolicy (string type)

defensive_checklist.item: Default only applied when field is zero-value (empty string)

review_patterns_checked.result: PASS — DeploymentSpecDefaults now covers Replicas, RevisionHistoryLimit, ProgressDeadlineSeconds, Strategy (type + RollingUpdate params), and RestartPolicy. Remaining DeploymentSpec fields (MinReadySeconds, Paused) default to zero values and need no explicit handling.
PASS — TestDeploymentSpecDefaults leaves RestartPolicy unset and verifies it becomes Always. TestDeploymentSpecDefaults_preservesExplicitValues sets RestartPolicyNever and verifies preservation.
